---
name: 功能请求 / Feature Request
about: 为这个项目提出新功能建议 / Suggest a new feature for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 功能描述 / Feature Description

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述您想要的功能 / A clear and concise description of the feature you want -->

## 问题背景 / Problem Background

<!-- 这个功能要解决什么问题？ / What problem does this feature solve? -->

## 建议的解决方案 / Proposed Solution

<!-- 描述您认为应该如何实现这个功能 / Describe how you think this feature should be implemented -->

## 替代方案 / Alternatives

<!-- 您是否考虑过其他替代方案？ / Have you considered any alternative solutions? -->

## 附加信息 / Additional Context

<!-- 添加任何其他相关信息、截图等 / Add any other context, screenshots, etc. -->

## 优先级 / Priority

- [ ] 高 / High
- [ ] 中 / Medium
- [ ] 低 / Low
